news.paragraph: Tesla is navigating a mix of strategic responses and valuation debates, including the launch of new affordable financing plans following a drop in its China market share. While some analysts have lowered price targets and maintained sell ratings, there is ongoing uncertainty regarding the company's AI and Robotaxi initiatives. Traders should consider these conflicting views on long-term potential versus immediate competitive pressures.
headlines: Tesla (TSLA) Valuation In Focus As Q1 Strength Meets AI And Robotaxi Uncertainty
Elon Musk's Tesla Launches Affordable Financing Plan After Dropping Out Of China's Top EV 10 Makers
Phillip Securities Adjusts Price Target on Tesla to $215 From $220, Maintains Sell Rating
